'''âz-h-sh''' ('''zahasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubstomp|pubstomp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubstomp|pubstomp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| zahasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zahashithi|zahashithi]] || [[word:zahashiji|zahashiji]] || [[word:zahashishi|zahashishi]] || [[word:zahashi|zahashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahashuthuth|zahashuthuth]] || [[word:zahashujuj|zahashujuj]] || [[word:zahashushush|zahashushush]] || [[word:zahash|zahash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahashuthu|zahashuthu]] || [[word:zahashuju|zahashuju]] || [[word:zahashushu|zahashushu]] || [[word:zahashu|zahashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahashufuth|zahashufuth]] || [[word:zahashufuj|zahashufuj]] || [[word:zahashufush|zahashufush]] || [[word:zahashuf|zahashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zahashethe|zahashethe]] || [[word:zahasheje|zahasheje]] || [[word:zahasheshe|zahasheshe]] || [[word:zahashe|zahashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahashothoth|zahashothoth]] || [[word:zahashojoj|zahashojoj]] || [[word:zahashoshosh|zahashoshosh]] || [[word:zahash|zahash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahashotho|zahashotho]] || [[word:zahashojo|zahashojo]] || [[word:zahashosho|zahashosho]] || [[word:zahasho|zahasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahashofoth|zahashofoth]] || [[word:zahashofoj|zahashofoj]] || [[word:zahashofosh|zahashofosh]] || [[word:zahashof|zahashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zahashĂŠthĂŠ|zahashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zahashĂŠjĂŠ|zahashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zahashĂŠshĂŠ|zahashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zahashĂŠ|zahashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahashathath|zahashathath]] || [[word:zahashajaj|zahashajaj]] || [[word:zahashashash|zahashashash]] || [[word:zahash|zahash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahashatha|zahashatha]] || [[word:zahashaja|zahashaja]] || [[word:zahashasha|zahashasha]] || [[word:zahasha|zahasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahashafath|zahashafath]] || [[word:zahashafaj|zahashafaj]] || [[word:zahashafash|zahashafash]] || [[word:zahashaf|zahashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zahashasha|zahashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozahashasha|gozahashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizahashasha|gokizahashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zahashnĂŒsha|zahashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozahashnknĂŒsha|gozahashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizahashnĂŒsha|gokizahashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zahashĂ«sha|zahashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozahashnkshĂ«sha|gozahashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizahashĂ«sha|gokizahashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zahashrosha|zahashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozahashnkrosha|gozahashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizahashrosha|gokizahashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zahashmusha|zahashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozahashnkmusha|gozahashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizahashmusha|gokizahashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zahasherasha|zahasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozahashnksherasha|gozahashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizahasherasha|gokizahasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zahashngasha|zahashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozahashnkngasha|gozahashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizahashngasha|gokizahashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zahashyasha|zahashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozahashnkyasha|gozahashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizahashyasha|gokizahashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zahashyamasha|zahashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozahashnkyamasha|gozahashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizahashyamasha|gokizahashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zahashnĂŒshĂ«sha|zahashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozahashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozahashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizahashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizahashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zahashnĂŒrosha|zahashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozahashnknĂŒrosha|gozahashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizahashnĂŒrosha|gokizahashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zahashnĂŒmusha|zahashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozahashnknĂŒmusha|gozahashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizahashnĂŒmusha|gokizahashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zahashĂ«nĂŒsha|zahashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozahashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozahashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizahashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizahashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zahashĂ«rosha|zahashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozahashnkshĂ«rosha|gozahashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizahashĂ«rosha|gokizahashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zahashĂ«musha|zahashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozahashnkshĂ«musha|gozahashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizahashĂ«musha|gokizahashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zahashronĂŒsha|zahashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozahashnkronĂŒsha|gozahashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizahashronĂŒsha|gokizahashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zahashroshĂ«sha|zahashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozahashnkroshĂ«sha|gozahashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizahashroshĂ«sha|gokizahashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zahashromusha|zahashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozahashnkromusha|gozahashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizahashromusha|gokizahashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zahashmunĂŒsha|zahashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozahashnkmunĂŒsha|gozahashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizahashmunĂŒsha|gokizahashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zahashmushĂ«sha|zahashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozahashnkmushĂ«sha|gozahashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizahashmushĂ«sha|gokizahashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zahashmurosha|zahashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozahashnkmurosha|gozahashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizahashmurosha|gokizahashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zahash|zahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠhĂŠsh|zĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozahash|hozahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠhĂŠsh|hozĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozahash|hohozahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠhĂŠsh|hohozĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzahash|nĂŒzahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠhĂŠsh|nĂŒzĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzahash|nĂŒnĂŒzahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠhĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzahash|nĂŻzahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠhĂŠsh|nĂŻzĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzahash|nĂŻnĂŻzahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠhĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzahash|luzahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠhĂŠsh|luzĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzahash|luluzahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠhĂŠsh|luluzĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizahash|lizahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠhĂŠsh|lizĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizahash|lilizahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠhĂŠsh|lilizĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozahash|kozahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠhĂŠsh|kozĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozahash|kokozahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠhĂŠsh|kokozĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezahash|kezahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠhĂŠsh|kezĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezahash|kekezahash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠhĂŠsh|kekezĂŠhĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
